verses.text: Ni tampi khit a kum thumna kumin Elijah' tungah Topa' thu hong tung a, “Pai in, Ahab kiangah nangmah kilak in. Tua ciangin keimah in leitungah guah ka zusak ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Ahab kiangah amah a kilaktawm dingin Elijah a pai hi. Tu-in Samaria-ah kialpi nasia hi
Tua ciangin Ahab in kumpi innsung a ukpa Obadiah sam hi. (Obadiah in nakpi takin Topa zahtak hi
Jezebel in Topa' kamsangte a hon thah lai-in Obadiah in kamsang za khat la-in sawmnga sawmnga-in leihawm sungah seel a, amaute an leh tui tawh a vak hi

Tua ciangin Ahab in Obadiah kiangah, “Gamsung ciktui omna khempeuh leh kuam omna khempeuhah va pai in. Lopa mu-in sakolte leh la-sakolte i hin'suahzo khading a, ganhingte pawlkhat i sum kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute in a et dingun leitang hawm uh hi. Ahab mahmah mun khat lamah pai-in Obadiah mahmah a mun dang khat lamah a pai hi
Obadiah lamkalah a om laitakin, Elijah in amah na dawntuah hi. Obadiah in amah thei-in a mai lei ngatin puk a, “Ka to Elijah, nang na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in dawngin, “Keimah ka hi hi. Pai-in na topa kiangah, ‘Elijah hih lai-ah om hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Amah in, “Hong thah dingin Ahab' khutsungah na nasempa nong piakna dingin bang thu-ah khial ka hi hiam

Topa na Pasian a nungta ahih mah bangin nangmah a zong dingin ka topa in a sawllohna minam ahi a, kumpi gam ahi zongin omlo hi. Amaute in, ‘Hih lai-ah amah omlo hi,’ a cih uh ciangin, amaute in nang hong muhlohna thu amah in kumpi gam ahi a, minam ahi zongin kiciamsak hi
Tu-in nangmah in, ‘Pai-in na topa kiangah, “Hih lai-ah Elijah om hi,” ci in,’ nong ci hi

Nang kiang panin kei ka paikhiat phetin ka theihlohna munah Topa' kha in nang hong pua ding hi. Kei va pai-in Ahab kiangah genin amah in nang hong muhloh ciangin, ka khangno lai-a kipanin keimah na nasempa in Topa a zahtak hinapi-in, amah in kei hong that ding hi
Jezebel in Topa' kamsangte a thah lai-in Topa' kamsangte mi za khat, sawmnga sawmnga-in leihawm sungah seelin, amaute an leh tui tawh ka vakna thu ka topa tungah hong kigen nailo ahi hiam
Tu-in nangmah in, ‘Pai-in na topa kiangah, “Hih lai-ah Elijah om hi,” ci in,’ nong ci hi. Tua hi leh amah in kei hong that ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Elijah in, “A mai-ah ka din'na Vanglian Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, tuni-in ama kiangah keimahmah ka kilak taktak ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Ahab tawh a kimu dingin Obadiah pai-in ama kiangah a gen hi. Tua ciangin Elijah tawh a kimu dingin Ahab hong pai hi
Ahab in Elijah a muh ciangin, “Israel mite a lungkhamsakpa, nang na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Amah in dawngin, “Keimah in Israel mite ka lungkhamsak kei hi. Nang in Topa' thupiaknate nusia-in Baal-te zui na hih manin nang leh na pa' innkuan in na lungkhamsak uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in mi sawl in la, Karmel Mual kei kiangah Israel-te khempeuh, leh Jezebel' sabuai-ah an a ne Baal kamsang za li leh sawmnga leh Asherah kamsang za lite hong khawm in,” a ci hi.
Tua ahih ciangin Ahab in Israel mite khempeuh kiangah mi sawlin, Karmel Mual-ah Israel mite leh kamsangte khawmsak hi

Tua ciangin mi khempeuh' nai-ah Elijah hong pai-in, “Ngaihsutna kibanglo thu nih kikalah bang tanvei khensat loin om niloh ding na hi uh hiam? Topa pen Pasian ahih leh amah zui un; tua hiloin Baal pen Pasian ahih leh amah zui un,” a ci hi. Ahi zongin mite in kam khat beek dawnglo uh hi
Tua ciangin Elijah in mite kiangah, “Kei, kei bekbek, Topa' kamsang sung panin ka omlai a, ahih hangin Baal kamsangte mihing za li leh sawmnga om hi

Kote tungah bawngtal nih hong pia un. Amau-a' dingin bawngtal khat amaute teelsak un la, semnen sakin sing tungah koihsak un la, ahih hangin a tungah mei koihsak kei un. Tua ciangin keimah in a bawngtal khat bawlin sing tungah koihin, a tungah mei ka koih kei ding hi

Tua ciangin note in na pasian tung uhah thu ngen un la, keimah in zong Topa' tungah thu ka ngen ding hi. Tua ciangin thungetna mei tawh hong pia pasian pen Pasian taktak ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in dawngin, “Hih na thugen hoih hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin Elijah in Baal kamsangte kiangah, “Note tam na hih manun note-a' dingin bawngtal khat teel un la bawl masa un. Tua ciangin na pasian uh tungah thu ngen un la, ahih hangin a tungah mei koih kei un,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amaute in amaute tungah a kipia bawngtal la-in bawl uh a, zingsang-a kipan sun dong Baal tungah thu ngenin, “Baal aw, kote hong dawng in,” a ci uh hi. Ahih hangin awging omlo a, kuamah in dawnglo hi. Tua ciangin amau' bawlsa biakna tau-ah amaute diang uh hi

Sun ciangin Elijah in amaute zahpihin, “Amah pen pasian ahih ciangin a gingin kiko un. Amah in thu a lungngaih laitak, ahih kei leh mun dangah paikhia, ahih kei leh khualzin, ahih kei leh amah ihmu-in phot ding kisam hikhathei ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute a gingin kiko-in, amau' ngeina bangin namsaute leh sikzumte tawh, amaute tungah si a luan' dongin ki-atin kisun uh hi
Sunkim khit ciangin biakpiak hun dong mateng amaute awngsuak uh a, ahih hangin awging omlo hi. Kuamah in dawnglo a, kuamah in donlo hi

Tua ciangin Elijah in mi khempeuh kiangah, “Ka kiang nai-ah hong pai un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh ama kiang nai-ah hong pai uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in Topa' biakna tau a kisupaisa khat puahkik hi
“Israel, nangma min hi ding hi,” ci-in Topa' thu a tun'na Jakob' tapa minam sawmlenihte tawh kizui-in Elijah in suangtum sawmlenih la hi
Tua ciangin tua suangte tawh Topa' minin biakna tau khat lam hi. Amah in khaici lawh nih a tazo dingin a lian hawklam khat biakna tau kimkotah bawl hi

Tua ciangin amah in a ngeina bangin a sing koih a, a bawngtal semnenin a sing tungah koih hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Beel li sungah tui dim un la, meihal biakna tau tung leh a sing tungah sung un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “A nihveina hih un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in a nihveina hih uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “A thumveina hih un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in a thumveina hih leuleu uh hi
Tua ciangin biakna tau kimkotah tui luang a, a hawklam zong tui tawh kidim hi

Biakpiak hun ciangin kamsang Elijah a nai-ah hong pai-in, “Abraham, Isaac, leh Israel Pasian, Topa aw, nang pen Israel sungah Pasian na hihna, leh kei pen nangma nasem ka hihna, leh hih nate khempeuh nangma thu tawh ka hihna thu tuni-in kitheisak in
Topa aw, nangmah Pasian na hihna leh amaute' lungsim na heikikna thu hih mite in a theihna dingin hong dawng in, Topa aw, hong dawng in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa' meikuang hong kia a, a meihal biakna, a sing, a suangte, leh a leivui kangtumin, hawklam sunga om tui nangawn kangcip hi
Mi khempeuh in tua thu a muh uh ciangin a mai uh leilam ngatin puk uh hi. Amaute in, “ Topa pen Pasian ahi hi; Topa pen Pasian ahi hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin Elijah in amaute kiangah, “Baal kamsangte man un; amaute khat zong suaktasak kei un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in man uh hi. Elijah in Kishon lui-ah amaute paipih sukin tua lai-ah amaute a that hi.
Tua ciangin Elijah in Ahab kiangah, “Paito in la, an ne-in tui dawn in; bang hang hiam cih leh guahpi huging om hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin anne tuidawn dingin Ahab paito hi. Karmel Mual dawnah Elijah paito a, amahmah leilakah kun sukin a khukte kikalah a maitang a phum hi
Tua ciangin a nasempa kiangah, “Tu-in paito in; tuipi lam va en in,” a ci hi. Amah paito-in khuadak a, “Bangmah omlo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Sagihvei paikik in,” a ci hi

A sagihveina ciangin amah in, “Khuttum cia bang meii tawmno khat tuipi panin hong kaito hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Paito-in Ahab kiangah, ‘Guah in hong khak khading ahih manin na leeng kithawi in la paisuk in,’ va ci in,” a ci hi
Tomno sungin meiite leh huih tawh van hong vom a, guah tampi a zu hi. Ahab a leeng tungah tuangin Jezreel-ah a pai hi
Tua ciangin Elijah tungah Topa' vangliatna hong tung hi. Amah in a kawng gakin Jezreel khua lutna dongah Ahab' mai-ah na tai hi.
